mapper.select:
SELECT id, type_code AS typeCode, type_name AS typeName, remark, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM device_type
AND type_code LIKE concat('%', #{typeCode}, '%')
AND type_name LIKE concat('%', #{typeName}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, type_code AS typeCode, type_name AS typeName, remark, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM device_type WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, type_code AS typeCode FROM device_type WHERE type_code = #{typeCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, type_name AS typeName FROM device_type WHERE type_name = #{typeName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_type (type_code, type_name, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{typeCode}, #{typeName}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE device_type SET type_code = #{typeCode}, type_name = #{typeName}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM device_type WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM camera WHERE type_id = #{typeId}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM camera WHERE type_id IN
#{id}
